channel.title: The Goldy Brown Journal
channel.description: Field notes from the Goldy Brown atelier on full grain leather, body-worn travel bags, vegetable tanning, hotel amenity programmes, and the craft of luxury leather goods. Designed in Vancouver, made in South India.

item.title: Groomsmen gifts in leather: a guide for the particular
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: What men actually use, what to avoid, how to personalise without it reading as wedding swag, and tier pricing from $50 to $400.

item.title: Airport security pat-down etiquette and the body-worn bag
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: What officers are looking for, what slows the line, and how to wear a body-worn bag through TSA, CATSA, and the European lanes without friction.

item.title: Hotel loyalty milestone gifting: what works at the 5-star tier
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: What 5-star hotels send their best repeat guests at status milestones, anniversaries, and recovery moments.

item.title: How to travel hands-free through airport security
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: A practical guide to body-worn travel bags, the unwritten rules of TSA carry-on, and the difference between a third bag and a worn accessory.

item.title: Leather repair vs replace: when to send it back
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: A field guide to leather repair. What can be fixed at home, what to send to a cobbler, what's a warranty case, and when a piece is genuinely past saving.

item.title: Vegetable-tanned vs chrome-tanned leather: a maker's guide
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: The two principal ways modern leather is tanned. What each gives you, what it costs, and why most luxury houses use both.

item.title: Choosing a hotel guest amenity kit
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: What 4- and 5-star properties actually look for in a leather amenity kit. The brief, the budget, the timeline, and the questions to ask before signing with a supplier.

item.title: How to care for full grain leather
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: The simple care routine that keeps full grain calfskin looking its best for a lifetime, and the three things that ruin it fastest.

item.title: Why South Indian leather supplies the world's luxury houses
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: The Tamil Nadu and Kerala tannery belt has fed European luxury for over a century. Why the leather travels, and what it brings to a finished bag.

item.title: What counts as a personal item on a flight
item.dc:creator: Goldy Brown
item.description: Carry-on rules across the major North American, European, and Gulf carriers. Worn accessories, third bags, and what gate agents actually flag.
